see_evidence: Circuit breakers monitor execution, count failures, and open when threshold exceeded — stops propagation
Interruptibility: agents can pause/override mid-execution without losing context (AG-UI protocol 2025)
Root cause of non-interruptible agents: sequential loop with no intercept (event-driven agent research)
ic_conditions_implemented: IC-5: recurring pattern across 2+ prior artifacts → gap → pause_and_amend
IC-6: T1 gate failures present → defect → pause_and_amend

validation_tests.test: import — all enums and constants correct

new_capabilities: CAPABILITY: IC-1→IC-6 evaluated after every artifact, not end-of-chunk — failures caught immediately
CAPABILITY: INTRA_CHUNK_INTERRUPT_RECEIPT written on every trigger — full audit trail mid-chunk
CAPABILITY: W0 observe + W1 classify pipeline runs on every interrupt — structured learning from failures
CAPABILITY: Chunk halts on defect/gap; continues on friction — controlled, not silent
CAPABILITY: Autonomous sidecar generation at threshold=2 for same-class IC triggers (AMEND-0006 integrated)
CAPABILITY: All observations written to ISSUE_LESSON_LOG_v1.jsonl — learning loop closes in real time
chatgpt_deployment: Call after each artifact: python intra_chunk_interrupt_checker_v1.py --stage-name STAGE --artifact-id ART --canmore-attempted / --see-result-count N / etc.
Check exit code: 0 = chunk clean or warns only; 1 = chunk halted, resolve interrupt before continuing
